title: Achievement Style
description: This mod redesigns the look of achievements!
body:
## Tired of Minecraft’s basic advancement notifications?  
**Achievement Style** replaces them with a cleaner, more modern notification system.  

Advancements now appear as smooth, animated messages in the bottom-right corner of your screen, featuring the item icon and title for a more immersive experience.

---

# ✅ **Features:**  
- ✔ Fully **client-side** – no need to install on servers  
- ✔ Compatible with most mods that add custom advancements  
- ✔ Lightweight and performance-friendly  
- ✔ **Highly customizable** via Mod Menu  
- ✔ **Sound customizable** via Mod Menu  
- ✔ **Multilingual support** out of the box

---

## 🔧 **Customization:**  
You can tweak:
- Notification size (width, height)  
- Animation speed & duration  
- Vertical position & spacing  
- Background color, border, and shine effect  
- Sound

> Configuration is available in-game via **Mod Menu**  
> 🧩 Requires:  
> • [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)  
> • [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

---

## 🌐 **Configuration Menu Supported Languages:**  
- English 🇬🇧  
- Українська 🇺🇦  
- Deutsch 🇩🇪  
- Français 🇫🇷  
- Español 🇪🇸  
- Polski 🇵🇱  
- 日本語 🇯🇵

---
